languages.original_text: "In the ice-bound lake of tears, you will find what has been lost, but will you find peace? Death has a single eye that watches from the darkness of the ages, but its hands will be you... Ack...! I'm sorry, Master Cogbelly, it was stronger than me."

languages.text: "В ледяном озере слез обрящешь утерянное, но обретешь ли покой? У смерти единственный глаз, что смотрит из тьмы веков, но руками ее будешь ты... кххх... Прости, пузатый господин, это было сильнее меня".

"In the ice-bound lake of tears, you will find what has been lost, but will you find peace? Death has a single eye that watches from the darkness of the ages, but its hands will be you... Ack...! I'm sorry, Master Cogbelly, it was stronger than me."

"In the ice-bound lake of tears, you will find what has been lost, but will you find peace? Death has a single eye that watches from the darkness of the ages, but its hands will be you... Ack...! I'm sorry, Master Potbelly, it was stronger than me."

languages.text: «En el lago helado de las lágrimas, encontrarás lo que has perdido, pero ¿encontrarás la paz? La muerte tiene un solo ojo que observa desde la oscuridad de las eras, pero sus manos serán... ¡Ah...! Lo siento, maestro barriga de engranaje, ha sido más fuerte que yo».
languages.original_text: "In the ice-bound lake of tears, you will find what has been lost, but will you find peace? Death has a single eye that watches from the darkness of the ages, but its hands will be you... Ack...! I'm sorry, Master Cogbelly, it was stronger than me."

traits.locale_text: «En el lago helado de las lágrimas, encontrarás lo que has perdido, pero ¿encontrarás la paz? La muerte tiene un solo ojo que observa desde la oscuridad de las eras, pero sus manos serán... ¡Ah...! Lo siento, maestro barriga de engranaje, ha sido más fuerte que yo».

languages.text: 「氷に閉ざされた涙の湖で、お前は失われたものを見つけるだろう。だが、安らぎは見つかるだろうか？ 死は、幾星霜の闇から見つめる一つの目を持つ。だが、その手はお前自身となる……うっ……！ ごめんよ、歯車腹の旦那、抑えきれなかった」
languages.original_text: "In the ice-bound lake of tears, you will find what has been lost, but will you find peace? Death has a single eye that watches from the darkness of the ages, but its hands will be you... Ack...! I'm sorry, Master Cogbelly, it was stronger than me."

traits.locale_text: 「氷に閉ざされた涙の湖で、お前は失われたものを見つけるだろう。だが、安らぎは見つかるだろうか？ 死は、幾星霜の闇から見つめる一つの目を持つ。だが、その手はお前自身となる……うっ……！ ごめんよ、歯車腹の旦那、抑えきれなかった」

languages.text: “在冰封的泪湖里，你会找到遗失之物，但你能获得平静吗？死亡睁开独眼，自岁月的暗影中凝视，而你将化作它的双手……咳……抱歉，大铁肚贤者，它的力量实在是太强了。”
languages.original_text: "In the ice-bound lake of tears, you will find what has been lost, but will you find peace? Death has a single eye that watches from the darkness of the ages, but its hands will be you... Ack...! I'm sorry, Master Cogbelly, it was stronger than me."

traits.locale_text: “在冰封的泪湖里，你会找到遗失之物，但你能获得平静吗？死亡睁开独眼，自岁月的暗影中凝视，而你将化作它的双手……咳……抱歉，大铁肚贤者，它的力量实在是太强了。”

languages.text: "Im eisgebundenen See der Tränen wirst du finden, was verloren ging, aber auch Frieden? Der Tod hat ein Auge, das aus der Dunkelheit der Zeitalter beobachtet, aber seine Hand wirst du sein ... "Argh! Tut mir leid, Meister Ritzelbauch, es war stärker als ich."
languages.original_text: "In the ice-bound lake of tears, you will find what has been lost, but will you find peace? Death has a single eye that watches from the darkness of the ages, but its hands will be you... Ack...! I'm sorry, Master Cogbelly, it was stronger than me."

traits.locale_text: "Im eisgebundenen See der Tränen wirst du finden, was verloren ging, aber auch Frieden? Der Tod hat ein Auge, das aus der Dunkelheit der Zeitalter beobachtet, aber seine Hand wirst du sein ... "Argh! Tut mir leid, Meister Ritzelbauch, es war stärker als ich."

languages.text: « Vous pourriez retrouver ce qui a été perdu, mais obtiendrez-vous la paix pour autant ? L'œil unique de la mort observe depuis les ténèbres du fond des âges, mais ses mains seront votre... Argh ! Pardon, maître ventripotent, c'était plus fort que moi. »
languages.original_text: "In the ice-bound lake of tears, you will find what has been lost, but will you find peace? Death has a single eye that watches from the darkness of the ages, but its hands will be you... Ack...! I'm sorry, Master Cogbelly, it was stronger than me."

traits.locale_text: « Vous pourriez retrouver ce qui a été perdu, mais obtiendrez-vous la paix pour autant ? L'œil unique de la mort observe depuis les ténèbres du fond des âges, mais ses mains seront votre... Argh ! Pardon, maître ventripotent, c'était plus fort que moi. »

languages.text: "Gözyaşlarının buz tuttuğu gölde kaybolanları bulacaksın. Peki huzur bulacak mısın? Ölümün tek bir gözü var. O göz, çağların karanlığından izler. Elleriyse sen olacaksın... Ah! Özür dilerim Üstat Dişli Göbek, benden güçlü çıktı."
languages.original_text: "In the ice-bound lake of tears, you will find what has been lost, but will you find peace? Death has a single eye that watches from the darkness of the ages, but its hands will be you... Ack...! I'm sorry, Master Cogbelly, it was stronger than me."
